overview: A modern, professional portfolio website for Rupika Kannan, Communicative English Tutor based in Dharmapuri, India. Showcases teaching experience, skills, services, gallery, and testimonials with smooth animations, dark green/white/grey palette, and conversion-focused CTAs including a WhatsApp chat button and demo class booking form.
features: Hero section with profile image, tagline, and Book a Demo CTA
About, Experience, Skills, and Services sections
Contact form with click-to-call and social links
Smooth scroll navigation with sticky navbar
SEO optimized for English tutoring in Dharmapuri
